1000645023.english: A savior is one who does not discriminate against individuals but pours their heart into everyone. Okay...
1000645023.korean: 개개인에게 차등을 두지 않고, 만인에게 정성을 쏟는 게 구원자거늘. 그래...

1000645024.english: Just as Azazel said... Just as the savior treated me...
1000645024.korean: 아자젤이 말했던 것처럼... 구원자가 나를 그렇게 대했듯이...

1000645025.english: ... It was a very gentle smile, Saraqael...

1000645027.english: That's enough, Ramiel! Come out from behind the tent now!
1000645027.korean: 됐으니까 이제 천막 뒤에서 나와라, 라미엘!

1000645028.english: But, but how can I be the only one wearing such nice clothes...?
1000645028.korean: 그, 그렇지만 어떻게 저만 이렇게 좋은 옷을 입고...

1000645029.english: Even Sarachael is wearing such bad clothes that they only cover the essentials...
1000645029.korean: 사라카엘조차 치부만 골라 가릴 정도로 안 좋은 옷을 입고 있는데...

1000645030.english: If it's a conduit for the power bestowed by the light, it's as good as my own body!
1000645030.korean: 빛이 하사한 권능의 매개체라면 내 몸이나 마찬가지!

1000645031.english: I'm not hiding anything, this is part of my body blessed by the light!
1000645031.korean: 결코 치부를 가린 것이 아니다, 이건 빛의 축복을 받은 내 몸의 일부!

1000645032.english: ... And the savior liked this swimsuit.

1000645033.english: Angel too... It would have been great if Azazel and Veronica had participated too...
1000645033.korean: 엔젤도... 아자젤과 베로니카도 함께 참여했다면 좋았을텐데...

1000645036.english: A swimsuit contest! That looks fun!

1000645037.english: Then our cannoneer unit can't be left out. Isn't that right?
1000645037.korean: 그렇다면 우리 캐노니어 부대가 빠질 수 없지. 안 그런가!

1000645038.english: Captain, if you suddenly barge in, it will put the commander in a difficult position...
1000645038.korean: 대장, 갑자기 난입하면 사령관이 곤란해 합니다...

1000645039.english: Hahaha! Still don't understand the commander's intentions?

1000645041.english: There's a saying about seeing the forest for the trees. Alright, what are you all doing?!
1000645041.korean: 나무가 아닌 숲을 보라는 격언이 있지. 자자, 뭣들 하나!

1000645042.english: Hey, everyone, come up here! And the new kids this time too!
1000645042.korean: 거기, 다들 올라와! 이번에 새로 온 애들도!

1000645043.english: Let's all participate in the swimsuit contest!

1000645045.english: The Arsenal captain was the quickest to act.

1000645046.english: Shouldn't we also act according to our lord's true intentions?
1000645046.korean: 우리도 주군의 진의대로 움직여야 되지 않겠소?

1000645047.english: The Steel Line troops are already prepared.

1000645048.english: How's the progress on your end?

1000645052.english: - The audience members sitting in the seats began to climb onto the stage one by one.
1000645052.korean: - 객석에 앉아있던 관객들이 하나둘씩 단상에 올라섰다.

1000645053.english: - The hesitant devotees were either pushed or led by the Orca crew members to crash the swimsuit contest.
1000645053.korean: - 쭈뼛대고 있던 신도들도 오르카호 대원들에게 떠밀리거나, 이끌려서 수영복 콘테스트에 난입했다.

1000645054.english: - Did they read my true intentions behind holding the festival? I was very grateful to the members.
1000645054.korean: - 페스티벌 개최에 숨겨진 내 속뜻을 읽은 걸까. 대원들에게 감사한 마음이 컸다.

1000645055.english: - Amidst the massive crowd, not a single injury occurred, and everyone was laughing and chatting, cheering for who the winner was.
1000645055.korean: - 수많은 인파 속에서 한 명의 부상자도 발생하지 않고, 모두가 웃고 떠들며 우승자가 누구냐고 환성을 질렀다.

1000645056.english: - It wasn't the result I expected, but it seems like it will be a satisfying ending for everyone, so I couldn't help but smile.
1000645056.korean: - 예상했던 결과는 아니었지만, 모두가 만족할 만한 결말이 될 것 같아서 절로 미소가 나왔다.

1000645059.english: - After seeing their subtle reactions, I quickly checked the score sheet.
1000645059.korean: - 두 사람의 미묘한 반응을 본 후 재빨리 채점표를 확인해봤다.

1000645060.english: - Everyone there had perfect scores recorded, and the newly arrived members were no different.
1000645060.korean: - 그곳엔 모두 만점이 기록돼있었으며 방금 올라온 대원들도 마찬가지였다.

1000645062.english: True beauty is something that cannot be valued.
1000645062.korean: 진정한 미란 가치를 매길 수 없는 것.

1000645063.english: Just participating in the competition for someone you like is reason enough to get a perfect score.
1000645063.korean: 좋아하는 사람을 위해서 대회에 참여한 것만으로, 만점을 받을 이유는 충분하죠.

1000645064.english: - Announcing that everyone had scored full marks against the already fired-up team members would undoubtedly cause a commotion.
1000645064.korean: - 달아오를대로 달아오른 대원들 상대로 모두 만점이라고 발표했다간 한바탕 소란이 일어날 게 뻔했다.

1000645066.english: Shall we change the event to a customer grab?

1000645067.english: - With a preposterous proposal, the two of them lunged forward.
1000645067.korean: - 황당한 제안과 함께 두 사람이 달려들었다.

1000645070.english: We are pleased to announce that the swimsuit contest that was being held has concluded with a shocking result: all participants are joint winners! The battle for command has now begun!
1000645070.korean: 개최되고 있던 수영복 콘테스트의 참가인원 전부가 공동 우승이라는 충격적인 결말과 함께 사령관 쟁탈전이 시작됐다고 알려드립니다!

1000645071.english: I got it! If there's a tie, I got it right too, Salamander?
1000645071.korean: 땄다! 공동 우승자면 나도 맞춘 거지, 샐러맨더?

1000645072.english: Huh? Where did this kid go?

1000645073.english: Earlier, you said you had an urgent matter and would be away for a little while... What's this note?
1000645073.korean: 아까 급한 일이 생겼다고 잠시 자리를 비운다고 했었는데... 이 쪽지는?

1000645074.english: ..." Since it was a bet to guess the only winner, the organizer wins.

1000645078.english: Just a moment! No open flames at the festival...?!

1000645080.english: - When unexpected fireworks lit up the beach, the members, who took it as the official start of the commander competition, charged in from all directions.
1000645080.korean: - 때아닌 폭죽이 해변가를 수놓자, 사령관 쟁탈전의 본격적인 시작으로 받아들인 대원들이 사방에서 달려들었다.

1000645081.english: - After being held in the arms of BoRyeon and Audrey for only a moment, I was soon dragged around from place to place. From the arms of the Horizon crew to a public servant.
1000645081.korean: - 보련과 오드리의 품에 안겨있었던 것도 잠시, 나는 곧 이곳저곳으로 끌려 다녔다. 호라이즌 대원들의 품에서 퍼블릭 서펀트까지.

1000645082.english: - My voice couldn't reach the crew members who were intoxicated by the festival's excitement.
1000645082.korean: - 축제의 열기에 취한 대원들에게 내 목소리는 닿지 않았다.

1000645083.english: That naked form...! The form the light took when it descended to Earth as a human...!
1000645083.korean: 저 헐벗은 모습...! 빛이 지상에 인간으로 강림했을 때의 그 모습...!

1000645084.english: This is not the time for such words, Saraqael. If the Savior is attending the event, shouldn't we also participate?
1000645084.korean: 그런 말씀하실 때가 아닙니다, 사라카엘님. 구원자님이 걸린 행사라면 저희도 참가해야 하지 않겠습니까?

1000645085.english: Everyone is enjoying themselves, but the Savior's heart... Heh heh. Ahahaha!
1000645085.korean: 모두들 즐거워하고 계시는데, 구원자님의 마음이... 후훗. 아하하하하!

1000645086.english: Before the savior is taken away... We should step up too...

1000645089.english: Shall we all go together to save the savior?

1000645091.english: - Saraqael snatched me up, my clothes in tatters.
1000645091.korean: - 입고 있던 옷이 넝마가 된 나를 사라카엘이 낚아챘다.

1000645093.english: This time... No, I'll continue to be your strength.

1000645094.english: I will be by your side to assist you in spreading the Savior's will throughout the world.
1000645094.korean: 구원자의 의지를 세상에 널리 퍼뜨릴 수 있도록 곁에서 보좌하지.

1000645095.english: - With a faint smile playing on her lips, Sarakael threw me with all her might, and Veronica, who was standing nearby, caught me safely.
1000645095.korean: - 입가에 살며시 미소를 그려낸 사라카엘이 나를 힘껏 던졌고, 멀지 않은 곳에 있었던 베로니카가 안전하게 받아냈다.

1000645096.english: You've taken on too much, Savior.

1000645097.english: Yes. That might be the Savior's way, tho.

1000645098.english: This time as well, I will do my best and follow the will of the Savior.

1000645099.english: - As Veronica ran across the sandy beach, trying to shake off the team members chasing her, Ramiel and Angel appeared before her.
1000645099.korean: - 쫓아오는 대원들을 따돌리며 모래사장을 달리던 베로니카 앞에 라미엘과 엔젤이 나타났다.

1000645100.english: - The angel who received the message from Veronica smiled brightly.
1000645100.korean: - 베로니카에게서 나를 전달받은 엔젤이 환하게 웃었다.

1000645101.english: This time, it's our turn to save the savior.
1000645101.korean: 이번엔 저희가 구원자님을 구원해 드릴 차례네요.

1000645102.english: Ramiel-nim, I think it's okay now.

1000645104.english: Me... No, thank you for saving everyone...

1000645105.english: - With Ramiel's help, the angel and I soared high. The angel, who was so high up that the other members below looked like dots, reached out a hand toward me.
1000645105.korean: - 라미엘의 도움을 받은 엔젤과 나는 높게 날아올랐다. 밑의 대원들이 점으로 보일 만큼 높은 곳에 있던 천사가 나를 향해 손을 뻗었다.

1000645107.english: - The angel who had come to greet me from the sky was wearing a dazzling smile.
1000645107.korean: - 하늘에서 마중 나온 천사는 눈부신 미소를 짓고 있었다.

1000645108.english: - As always, that smile you give me.

1000645110.english: - I'm a human who tries to be perfect.

1000645111.english: - It's the help of everyone, including Azazel, that makes me perfect.
1000645111.korean: - 이런 나를 완벽하게 만들어주는 건 아자젤을 비롯한 모두의 도움이다.

1000645112.english: - We will continue to face numerous crises in the future, struggling and striving to find solutions.
1000645112.korean: - 우리는 앞으로도 수많은 위기와 맞닥뜨리고, 발버둥쳐가며 해답을 찾아 나서겠지.

1000645113.english: - Until we restore this world to its original state, we won't have many days to laugh and joke around.
1000645113.korean: - 이 세상을 원래대로 되돌리기 전까지, 우리가 웃고 떠들 수 있는 날은 많지 않다.

1000645114.english: - Even if it's just a moment of peace, that's fine.

1000645115.english: - Until days like summer vacations become everyday life, I will continue to move forward with them.
1000645115.korean: - 여름휴가 같은 날이 일상이 될 때까지, 나는 이들과 계속해서 나아갈 것이다.

1000645123.english: If I'm so tired I feel like I'm going to collapse, I'll tell Undine first.
1000645123.korean: 피곤해서 쓰러질 것 같으면 운디네에게 제일 먼저 말할게.

1000645132.english: Okay. What about the other side?

1000645133.english: My summer vacation starts tomorrow, so please just hold on until then.

1000645139.english: Didn't the ability to read minds disappear?

1000645141.english: Sorry, did you have to wait long?

1000645145.english: I don't care about that at all.
1000645145.korean: 나는 그런 거 전혀 신경 안써.

1000645147.english: We have infrastructure that we manage.

1000645150.english: No, you don't need to do that.

1000645151.english: You guys didn't do anything wrong.

1000645155.english: Really? Then I will forgive the sins of both of you and the other believers.
1000645155.korean: 그래? 그럼 두 사람과 다른 신도들의 죄도 모두 사할게.

1000645159.english: It's okay. It's okay to cry.

1000645163.english: Hey guys, I have a question...

1000645169.english: Then why did you invite me?

1000645171.english: Where did Ramiel and Saraqael go?

1000645177.english: Is it going according to plan...?

1000645190.english: I didn't mean for this to happen...

1000645194.english: How are we going to clean up the mess...?

1000645197.english: My clothes ripped, just a moment!

1000645204.english: - Leaving the captain's quarters behind, which had instantly turned into a sea of ​​tears, I stepped out into the hallway.
1000645204.korean: - 순식간에 눈물바다가 되어버린 함장실을 뒤로하고 복도로 나왔다.

1000645205.english: - It’s the same for Angel and Ramiel… but the other believers must need care too.
1000645205.korean: - 엔젤과 라미엘도 그렇지만… 다른 신도들도 보살핌이 필요하겠지.

1000645206.english: - As I walked along, thinking about what to do next, I spotted Boryeon waving her hands frantically from far down the hallway.
1000645206.korean: - 앞으로의 대책을 생각하며 발걸음을 옮기다 복도 저 멀리에서 손을 붕붕 흔드는 보련의 모습이 눈에 들어왔다.

1000645208.english: I was looking for this, so this is perfect timing.

1000645209.english: I heard that summer vacation is resuming. Is that correct?

1000645210.english: - Fortunately, the incident involving the branch was concluded in just one day.
1000645210.korean: - 다행히도 지부에 관련된 사건은 하루만에 마무리됐다.

1000645211.english: - I'm still tidying up, but... I should resume my long-awaited summer vacation as soon as possible. I don't know when I'll be able to rest again.
1000645211.korean: - 아직 뒷정리 중이긴 하지만… 모처럼의 여름휴가를 최대한 빨리 재개해야겠지. 앞으로는 또 언제 쉴 수 있을지 모르기도 하고.

1000645213.english: Would you be able to attend the fashion competition we were planning to hold last time as an honorary judge?
1000645213.korean: 저번에 열기로 했던 패션 대회에 명예 심사 위원으로 참석해주실 수 있나요~?

1000645214.english: Bo-ryeon, you should call it a swimsuit contest, not a fashion competition.
1000645214.korean: 보련양, 패션대회가 아니라 수영복 콘테스트라고 해야죠.

1000645217.english: You're sure to love it! Ms. Audrey and I put our hearts and souls into preparing it.
1000645217.korean: 분명 마음에 드실 걸요~? 저와 오드리 선생님이 심혈을 기울여 준비했으니까요~!

1000645218.english: I really hope the Commander attends and graces the occasion.
1000645218.korean: 사령관이 꼭 참석해서 자리를 빛내줬으면 좋겠어요.

1000645219.english: - A good idea suddenly came to mind.

1000645221.english: You can't run away again just because you're busy, okay?

1000645226.english: - I looked around the ship briefly and returned to the captain's quarters.

1000645227.english: - I have given all the instructions, so there is time until tomorrow when the cleanup is finished.
1000645227.korean: - 지시는 전부 내려뒀으니, 뒷정리가 마무리될 내일까지는 시간이 있다.

1000645228.english: - What should I do for the rest of today?

1000645229.english: - Not long ago… I ended up being comforted by Azazel…
1000645229.korean: - 얼마전에… 내가 아자젤에게 위로를 받아 버렸었지…

1000645230.english: - I walked over to Azazel's room to talk a little more.
1000645230.korean: - 조금 더 이야기를 나누기 위해 아자젤의 방으로 발걸음을 옮겼다.

1000645232.english: - I walked down the hallway, arrived at Azazel's room, and rang the doorbell.
1000645232.korean: - 복도를 지나 아자젤의 방에 도착해 벨을 눌렀다.

1000645234.english: - Along with the sound of crashing and banging, Azazel's urgent voice was heard.
1000645234.korean: - 우당탕 쿵탕하는 소리와 함께 아자젤의 다급한 목소리가 들려왔다.

1000645236.english: - I leaned my back against the wall, feeling a sense of déjà vu.
1000645236.korean: - 어쩐지 느껴지는 데자뷰를 느끼며 벽에 등을 기댔다.

1000645237.english: - This time, the door peeked open only after enough time had passed to cook four cups of tteokbokki.
1000645237.korean: - 이번에는 컵떡볶이 네 개는 족히 조리할 시간이 지나서야, 방문이 빼꼼 열렸다.

1000645238.english: - As I tried to enter, the door closed again.

1000645240.english: I originally planned to prepare a few more things... but, the rejection came so suddenly...
1000645240.korean: 원래는 좀 더 이것저것 준비하려고 했는데… 바, 반려가 너무 급작스러게 와서요…

1000645241.english: … Ah! I, I'm not blaming my partner. It's just…

1000645244.english: - As soon as I stepped into the room, I saw what I had expected… or rather, it wasn’t the familiar outfit she always wore whenever I came to visit…
1000645244.korean: - 간신히 방으로 들어서자, 예상했던… 정확히는 내가 찾아올 때마다 입고 나오던 익숙한 의상이 아니라…

1000645247.english: - I was lost in thought, but Azazel’s words snapped me back to reality.
1000645247.korean: - 넋을 놓고 있다 아자젤의 말에 간신히 정신을 차렸다.

1000645249.english: - It was the same old, unstylish thing I always say, but Azazel smiled slightly as if that was enough.
1000645249.korean: - 내가 항상 하는, 멋도 뭣도 없는 말이었지만 아자젤은 그거면 충분하다는듯 작게 미소지었다.

1000645250.english: Actually, this wasn't the original plan.

1000645251.english: - Azazel's words reminded me of not long ago. I was definitely preparing for the 'Lightfall' event.
1000645251.korean: - 아자젤의 말에 얼마전을 떠올렸다. 분명 '빛내림' 행사를 준비하고 있었지.

1000645252.english: Normally… after the religious ceremony, I would surprise my partner with this outfit…
1000645252.korean: 원래대로라면… 종교 행사가 끝나고 반려를 이 옷으로 놀라게 해주고…

1000645253.english: While taking a walk through the branch where traces of the denomination still remain, I explained various things to you...
1000645253.korean: 아직 교단의 흔적이 남아있는 지부를 산책하면서, 제가 이것저것 설명도 해주고…

1000645254.english: I had planned to spend some nice time together at the outdoor table I had prepared in advance, but...
1000645254.korean: 미리 준비해둔 야외 테이블에서 근사하게 같이 시간을 보내려고 했는데…

1000645255.english: - Azazel's face darkened as if recalling the events at the branch.
1000645255.korean: - 지부에서의 일을 다시 떠올린듯, 아자젤의 얼굴이 어두워졌다.

1000645256.english: Oh, I'm sorry. It must have been much harder for you than it was for me, and yet I'm just whining again...
1000645256.korean: 아, 죄송해요. 반려는 저보다도 훨씬 더 힘들었을텐데, 또 투정이나 부리고…

1000645257.english: - At my words, Azazel puffed out her cheeks as if throwing a tantrum.
1000645257.korean: - 내 말에 아자젤은 투정을 부리듯 볼을 살짝 부풀렸다.

1000645258.english: That's right. I'm a silly angel who's clumsy at everything and only makes mistakes.
1000645258.korean: 그래요. 저는 이것저것 다 서툴러서 실수만 하는 바보 천사에요.

1000645259.english: Getting scolded by Saraqael all the time and just hearing nagging from Veronica…!
1000645259.korean: 맨날 사라카엘한테 혼나고, 베로니카한테 잔소리만 듣구…!

1000645260.english: To my partner alone… I want to be an angel they can rely on, and a partner…
1000645260.korean: 반려에게만은… 의지할 수 있는 천사이자, 반려이고 싶은데…

1000645261.english: - Seeing Azazel suddenly sulk and look dejected, I held her hand while trying not to laugh.
1000645261.korean: - 심통을 부리다 급격히 시무룩해진 아자젤의 모습에 웃음을 참으며 손을 잡았다.

1000645263.english: - Just as her nickname "Angel" suggests, Azazel is known among the other members as a kind and warm-hearted angel.
1000645263.korean: - 천사님이라는 호칭처럼, 아자젤은 다른 대원들에게는 자애롭고 따뜻한 천사로 통한다.

1000645264.english: - Even though they bicker with Saraqael and get nagged by Veronica... that must be proof that our angels are like family.
1000645264.korean: - 사라카엘과 투닥거리고, 베로니카에게 잔소리를 듣긴 하지만… 그건 우리 천사님들이 가족같은 사이라는 증거겠지.

1000645265.english: - Only I know that innocent, girlish side of her—how she’ll be doing one thing one moment and then do something else the next, and how she gets all downcast the moment you tease her.
1000645265.korean: - ~하다가도 ~하고, 놀리면 금세 시무룩하는 순진한 아가씨 같은 모습은, 나만이 알고 있다.

1000645267.english: I told you it's gone now.

1000645268.english: - Feeling a gentle smile spread across my	 lips, I pulled Azazel into me arms.
1000645268.korean: - 입가에 잔잔한 웃음이 걸리는 것을 느끼며 아자젤을 품에 안았다.

1000645269.english: - As if conveyed, a smile bloomed on Azazel's lips as well.
1000645269.korean: - 마치 그것이 전해진듯, 아자젤의 입가에도 미소가 피어났다.

1000645271.english: - I met Azazel's eyes from within the embrace of dazzling white wings.
1000645271.korean: - 눈부시게 하얀 날개의 품 속에서 아자젤과 눈을 맞췄다.

1000645272.english: - We don't talk anymore. Even without the ability to telepathize, words aren't necessary between us.
1000645272.korean: - 더 이상 이야기는 나누지 않는다. 굳이 정신감응 능력이 없더라도, 우리 사이에 말은 필요하지 않으니까.

1000645273.english: - Instead, I gently cupped Azazel's cheek with one hand.
1000645273.korean: - 그대신 한 손으로 아자젤의 볼을 조심스럽게 감쌌다.

1000645274.english: - Azazel's flushed face slowly drew closer, and just as the tips of their noses were about to touch.
1000645274.korean: - 아자젤의 상기된 얼굴이 천천히 가까워지고, 코 끝이 맞닿을 때 쯤.

1000645275.english: - It felt as though I had heard the voice inside Azazel's heart, filled with sincerity and affection, which should never have been heard.
1000645275.korean: - 들릴 리 없는, 진심과 애정으로 가득찬 아자젤의 마음 속 소리가 들린 것 같았다.

1000645276.english: - I've heard the general outline, but... I guess we'll need to talk a bit more.
1000645276.korean: - 대강의 일은 들었지만… 좀 더 이야기를 나눠봐야 하겠지.

1000645277.english: - I headed to Saraqael's room with a slightly nervous heart.
1000645277.korean: - 살짝 긴장된 마음으로 사라카엘의 방으로 향했다.

1000645279.english: - After walking down the hallway for a while, I arrived in front of Saraqael's room. Unexpectedly, the door was open.
1000645279.korean: - 한동안 복도를 걸어 도착한 사라카엘의 방 앞. 뜻밖에도 문이 열려있었다.

1000645280.english: - As I cautiously peeked into the room, what stood before my eyes was…
1000645280.korean: - 슬쩍 방 안으로 고개를 들이민 내 눈 앞에는…

1000645282.english: You came at just the right time. I was just about to visit—

1000645283.english: - I quickly went back outside and closed the door.
1000645283.korean: - 신속히 다시 밖으로 나와 문을 닫았다.

1000645284.english: - It was only for a very brief moment, but the image remained vivid in my mind.
1000645284.korean: - 아주 잠깐이었지만, 뇌리에 이미지가 선명하게 남았다.

1000645285.english: - A well-balanced, toned body that looks solid yet soft.
1000645285.korean: - 탄탄하면서도 부드러워 보이는, 밸런스있게 단련된 몸.

1000645286.english: - From her long, slender legs, which perfectly complement her tall stature, to her shapely bust.
1000645286.korean: - 큰 키에 걸맞는 쭉 뻗은 두 다리와 모양 좋게 솟은 가슴까지.

1000645287.english: - Everything was impressive, but that isn't the reason I was surprised.
1000645287.korean: - 모든 것이 인상적이었지만, 내가 놀란 이유는 그게 아니다.

1000645288.english: - Of course, that seems to fall outside the category of 'normal' swimwear... but thanks to certain people, my own common sense is already far beyond the norm.
1000645288.korean: - 물론 그건 '일반적인' 수영복의 범주를 벗어나 있는 것 같지만… 누구누구들 덕분에 이미 내 상식부터가 일반적은 한참 벗어났으니까.

1000645289.english: - As I cautiously opened the door again, lost in thought to deny reality, I met Saraqael's eyes, who was wearing a subtle expression.
1000645289.korean: - 현실을 부정하기 위해 아무런 생각이나 하며 조심스레 다시 문을 열자, 미묘한 표정을 짓고 있는 사라카엘과 눈이 마주쳤다.

1000645291.english: If you have something to say, say it confidently. I am ready to answer any question.
1000645291.korean: 할 말이 있다면 당당하게 하도록 해라. 나는 어떤 물음에도 답할 준비가 되어 있다.

1000645293.english: - ...I didn't expect you to come out this confidently.

1000645294.english: - As I asked, barely managing to maintain my composure, Saraqael took a big step closer.
1000645294.korean: - 간신히 평상심을 유지하며 묻자, 사라카엘이 한 걸음 성큼 다가왔다.

1000645295.english: So I intended to ask the Savior for consecration.

1000645296.english: It would be best to adapt to the new doctrine as soon as possible... but I'm not used to wearing something like this yet.
1000645296.korean: 새로운 교리에 하루라도 빨리 적응하는 것이 바람직하나… 아직은 이런 것을 걸치는 것이 익숙하지 않군.

1000645297.english: If it is blessed by the hand of a savior, it would at least be some comfort.
1000645297.korean: 구원자의 손으로 축성을 해준다면 위안정도는 되겠지.

1000645299.english: - Startled by Sarakael's gaze, which seemed as if she might pass judgment at any moment, I waved my hands in protest.
1000645299.korean: - 당장이라도 심판을 내릴듯한 사라카엘의 눈빛에 화들짝 놀라 손사래를 쳤다.

1000645300.english: - If we don't do something about this, something terrible is going to happen...
1000645300.korean: - 어떻게든 하지 않으면 큰일이 나겠는데, 이거…

1000645301.english: Hmm. Then I'll leave it to you.

1000645302.english: - Sarakael... carefully held the feathers—which she claimed were a swimsuit—and offered a prayer.
1000645302.korean: - 사라카엘의 이... 본인은 수영복이라고 주장하는 깃털을 조심스레 잡고 기도를 올렸다.

1000645303.english: - Of course, it wasn’t a proper prayer; it was just a hastily cobbled-together version based on what Azazel had taught her and bits she’d picked up here and there, but as soon as she finished, Sarakael nodded with satisfaction.
1000645303.korean: - 당연히 제대로 된 것은 아니고, 아자젤이 알려준 것과 주워들은 것을 적당히 급조한 기도문이었지만, 손을 떼자 사라카엘은 만족스럽게 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000645304.english: I express my gratitude, Savior. I feel much lighter now.
1000645304.korean: 감사를 표한다, 구원자. 한결 마음이 가볍군.

1000645305.english: Anyway, what brings you all the way here?

1000645306.english: - When asked if she had had a change of heart, Sarakael snorted.
1000645306.korean: - 혹시 심경의 변화가 있었는지 묻자, 사라카엘은 코웃음을 쳤다.

1000645308.english: That place was no longer a sanctuary. It was a hotbed of apostasy.
1000645308.korean: 그곳은 이미 성역이 아니었다. 배교의 온상이었지.

1000645309.english: There is no way that proper scriptures could remain in a place like that.
1000645309.korean: 그런 곳에 제대로된 경전이 남아 있을리가 없지 않나.

1000645311.english: - There was something I sensed from Saraqael, who cut me off before I could even finish speaking.
1000645311.korean: - 내 말이 끝나기도 전에 딱 잘라 말하는 사라카엘에게서 느껴지는 것이 있었다.

1000645313.english: I believe in Azazel. No matter how tired or whiny she acts, a Seraphim is a Seraphim.
1000645313.korean: 나는 아자젤을 믿는다. 아무리 피곤하게 굴고 징징거려도, 치품천사는 치품천사.

1000645314.english: Azazel's faith is sincere, and her soul is clear and transparent.
1000645314.korean: 아자젤의 신앙은 진실되고, 영혼은 맑고 투명하지.

1000645315.english: Such an Azazel believes in you, the Savior, with all her heart.
1000645315.korean: 그런 아자젤이 너를, 구원자를 진심을 다해 믿고 있다.

1000645316.english: We believe that it will save us and this world.
1000645316.korean: 우리와 이 세상을 구원해줄 것이라고 믿고 있다.

1000645317.english: If you don't believe in such a person... then perhaps true faith never existed in this world in the first place.
1000645317.korean: 그런 자를 믿지 않는다면… 이 세상에 진실된 신앙 따위는 원래부터 존재하지 않는 거겠지.

1000645318.english: You will have to prove yourself, not repay me, Savior.

1000645319.english: - The tone was still stiff, but it didn't feel as intimidating as before.
1000645319.korean: - 여전히 딱딱한 말투였지만, 예전같은 위압감은 느껴지지 않는다.

1000645320.english: - I guess I can breathe a sigh of relief for now?
1000645320.korean: - 이건… 일단 한시름 놓았다고 생각해도 되겠지?

1000645321.english: That is correct. It is Veronica's suggestion, though.

1000645323.english: Did you seduce Azazel with such sweet words?

1000645324.english: - As I trailed off, having nothing to say about that, Saraqael smirked and approached me.
1000645324.korean: - 그거에 관해서는 할 말이 없는 내가 말을 흐리자, 사라카엘은 피식 웃으며 내게 다가섰다.

1000645325.english: I was simply curious, not blaming anyone.
1000645325.korean: 단순히 궁금했을 뿐, 탓하는 것이 아니다.

1000645326.english: Yeah… it’s not a bad feeling.

1000645330.english: - As I was left speechless by the unexpected remark, a faint smile appeared on Saraqael's lips.
1000645330.korean: - 뜻밖의 말에 내가 말을 잇지 못하자, 사라카엘의 입가에 희미한 미소가 걸렸다.

1000645331.english: Faith is blindness. Once you have decided to believe, every action of the Savior has meaning.
1000645331.korean: 믿음은 곧 맹목. 믿기로 한 이상, 구원자의 모든 행동은 의미를 가진다.

1000645332.english: As long as you are the savior and I am the savior's sword... even the simple act of a man and woman sharing love is a blessing to me.
1000645332.korean: 네가 구원자이고, 내가 구원자의 검인 이상… 단순히 남녀간에 사랑을 나누는 행위도 내게는 축복이다.

1000645333.english: Today, through that blessing… I will be born again… as a believer, and as a woman.
1000645333.korean: 난 오늘 그 축복을 통해… 한 명의 신도로서, 그리고 여성으로서… 다시 태어나겠다.

1000645334.english: - Perhaps it was just my imagination, but Saraqael's face seemed a little flushed as she spoke confidently.
1000645334.korean: - 기분 탓인지 여전히 당당하게 말하는 사라카엘의 얼굴이 조금 붉은 것 같았다.

1000645335.english: - Because of her initial attitude, I had always treated her with equal parts fear and difficulty, but now I finally feel that Sarakael is no different from the other team members.
1000645335.korean: - 처음의 태도 때문에 지금까지는 무서움 반, 어려움 반으로 대했었지만, 이제야 사라카엘도 다른 대원들과 다르지 않다는 것이 느껴졌다.

1000645336.english: You're stating the obvious. Have you forgotten the time a few months ago when I exposed the Savior's sins in detail?
1000645336.korean: 새삼스러운 말을 하는군. 몇 달 전, 내가 구원자의 죄를 낱낱히 밝혔던 때를 잊었나?

1000645337.english: So there is no need to be discouraged.

1000645338.english: I am the Sword of the Savior. No matter how it turns out, I am ready to gladly accept it.
1000645338.korean: 나는 구원자의 검. 어떤 식으로 나오든, 나는 기쁘게 받아들일 준비가 되어있다.

1000645339.english: - Having said that, Sarakael crossed her arms behind her back and gently closed her eyes, as if to show that she had no intention of resisting.
1000645339.korean: - 거기까지 말한 사라카엘은 저항할 생각이 없다는 것을 보여주듯 팔을 등 뒤로 모으고 살며시 눈을 감았다.

1000645340.english: - As I gently took hold of her shoulder, I noticed that Sarakael’s long eyelashes were trembling slightly as she moved closer.
1000645340.korean: - 조심스레 어깨를 붙잡자, 가까워진 사라카엘의 긴 속눈썹이 약하게 떨리는 것이 눈에 들어왔다.

1000645341.english: - What should I do for the rest of today?

1000645342.english: - Veronica usually has a hard time dealing with Azazel and Sarakael, but this time must have been especially tough for her.
1000645342.korean: - 평소에도 아자젤과 사라카엘에 치여 고생하는 베로니카지만, 이번에는 특히 더 힘들었겠지.

1000645343.english: - It would be good to meet and at least offer some comfort.

1000645345.english: - Veronica was nowhere to be seen, neither in her own room nor in Azazel and Sarakael’s room.
1000645345.korean: - 자신의 방에서도, 아자젤과 사라카엘의 방에서도 베로니카의 모습은 보이지 않았다.

1000645346.english: - Suddenly, a place Veronica might be heading came to mind, so I set my feet toward it.
1000645346.korean: - 문득 베로니카가 향할만한 곳이 떠올라 그곳으로 발걸음을 옮겼다.

1000645348.english: - As expected, I was able to meet Veronica in the auditorium where the religious event was originally scheduled to be held.
1000645348.korean: - 예상대로, 원래 종교 행사가 열리기로 예정되어 있었던 강당에서 베로니카를 만날 수 있었다.

1000645350.english: - Even though I had spoken to her from behind, Veronica turned around as if she had known I was there and bowed her head.
1000645350.korean: - 뒤에서 말을 걸었음에도 마치 알고있었다는 것 마냥 돌아선 베로니카가 꾸벅 고개를 숙였다.

1000645351.english: The others are busy cleaning up after the battle, so it's fine.
1000645351.korean: 다른 분들은 전투 뒷처리로 바쁘시니까요. 괜찮습니다.

1000645353.english: - Although there was no change in expression, sensing the unusual atmosphere, I decided to change the subject.
1000645353.korean: - 표정 변화는 없었지만 심상치 않은 분위기에 화제를 돌리기로 했다.

1000645354.english: - As I started sorting the pile of snacks, Veronica, who had been hesitating for a moment, also sat down silently beside me.
1000645354.korean: - 내가 수북이 쌓인 간식들을 분류하기 시작하자, 잠시 망설이던 베로니카도 소리없이 곁에 앉았다.

1000645356.english: - For a while, only the rustling sound of snack packaging echoed in the auditorium.
1000645356.korean: - 강당에는 한동안 간식 포장이 부스럭거리는 소리만이 울렸다.

1000645357.english: - Even though we spent quite a long time in silence, I didn't feel uncomfortable or awkward.
1000645357.korean: - 꽤나 긴 시간을 말없이 보냈는데도 불편하거나 어색한 느낌은 없다.

1000645358.english: - It might be because they have been together for a long time, but it is probably thanks to the atmosphere Veronica exudes—one that adapts to others and makes them feel comfortable.
1000645358.korean: - 함께 지낸 지 오래됐기 때문도 있겠지만, 베로니카 본인에게서 풍기는 남에게 맞춰주고, 편안하게 해주는 분위기 덕분이겠지.

1000645359.english: … Have you spoken with Lord Azazel since then?

1000645360.english: - As I answered a question that suddenly came flying at me while I was counting the chocolates, I felt Veronica's gaze slightly turn toward me.
1000645360.korean: - 초콜릿의 개수를 새던 중 돌연히 날아온 질문에 대답하자 베로니카의 시선이 살짝 내게 향하는 것이 느껴졌다.

1000645361.english: It would be best if you met with them to offer some comfort. I’m sure Azazel, the Angel of Mercy, has grown significantly through this experience, but…
1000645361.korean: 만나서 위로해 주시는 것이 좋겠습니다. 치품천사 아자젤님은 이번 일로 크게 성장하셨을테지만…

1000645362.english: Because the Savior's companion suffered a lot of emotional distress.

1000645363.english: - "I came to comfort Veronica," I said, and Veronica's hand, which was attaching a ribbon to the wrapping paper, stopped abruptly.
1000645363.korean: - 지금은 베로니카를 위로해주러 왔어, 라는 내 말과 함께 포장지에 리본을 붙이던 베로니카의 손이 딱 멎었다.

1000645365.english: - With a faint smile on her face, Veronica began to move her hands again.
1000645365.korean: - 희미한 미소를 띈 채로 베로니카는 다시 손을 움직이기 시작했다.

1000645366.english: Do you happen to have some free time during your vacation?

1000645367.english: If you don't mind, I would be happy if you could spend a day with me.
1000645367.korean: 괜찮으시면 하루 정도 저와 함께 보내 주셨으면 좋겠습니다.

1000645368.english: - "Is this a request for a first date from Veronica?" I was about to continue preparing for the event, feeling overwhelmed with emotion as if I had accomplished a challenge, when a thought suddenly occurred to me.
1000645368.korean: - 베로니카로부터의 첫 데이트 요청인가. 뭔가 도전을 완수한듯한 감개무량한 기분으로 행사 준비를 계속하려다, 문득 생각이 떠올랐다.

1000645369.english: It's okay. Because I already have it.

1000645370.english: Yes. My hobby is collecting nice outfits or accessories every time I go on a sortie.
1000645370.korean: 네. 출격할 때마다 괜찮은 의상이나 액세서리를 수집하는 게 취미입니다.

1000645371.english: I thought there was no need to show it.

1000645374.english: If I am in civilian clothes… you will be able to verify my faith, which you have been so curious about.
1000645374.korean: 사복차림이라면… 그렇게 궁금해하시던 제 신앙심을 확인해 보실 수 있겠군요.

1000645375.english: - Veronica, lightly ignoring my unconvincing argument, slowly took my hand and pulled me along.
1000645375.korean: - 설득력 없는 항변을 가볍게 무시한 베로니카는 내 손을 천천히 잡아 끌었다.

1000645376.english: You will check it soon, but... it is fine if you check it now in advance.
1000645376.korean: 곧 확인하실테지만… 지금 미리 확인해보셔도, 괜찮습니다만.

1000645377.english: - Veronica's hair, whispering softly in my ear, tickles my cheek.
1000645377.korean: - 귓가에 낮게 속삭이는 베로니카의 머리카락이 볼을 간질인다.

1000645378.english: - Before I knew it, my hand had touched her snow-white leg. Following the touch—one I couldn’t resist, or rather, didn’t want to resist—I slowly… pulled up the hem of her dress.
1000645378.korean: - 어느새 내 손은 새하얀 다리에 닿았다. 저항할 수 없는, 아니 저항하고 싶지 않은 손길에 따라 천천히… 옷자락을 끌어올린다.

1000645379.english: - Only when I reached the forbidden boundary—one her hem had never once crossed—did Veronica stop.
1000645379.korean: - 옷자락이 단 한번도 넘어가본 적 없는 금단의 경계에 다다라서야 베로니카는 손을 멈췄다.

1000645380.english: Everything… according to the Savior's will.

1000645381.english: - I felt Veronica's lips touch my ear, accompanied by a prayer mixed with a bit of playfulness.
1000645381.korean: - 약간 장난기가 섞인 기도문과 함께 베로니카의 입술이 귀에 닿는 것이 느껴졌다.

1000645382.english: - There is a common saying that the position makes the man. I am experiencing this firsthand, having suddenly taken on the role of the Last Human and Commander-in-Chief of the Resistance.
1000645382.korean: - 흔히 자리가 사람을 만든다는 말이 있다. 갑자기 최후의 인간이자 저항군 총사령관 역을 맡게된 내가 아주 잘 체감하고 있는 말이기도 하다.

1000645383.english: - Was it because it had been a long time since I became the savior of the Kohei Order, whether nominally or otherwise? An indescribable premonition flashed through my mind for a moment.
1000645383.korean: - 명목상이든 어쨌든, 코헤이 교단의 구원자가 된 지 오래된 탓일까. 무언가 형언할 수 없는 예감이 순간적으로 뇌리를 스쳤다.

1000645384.english: - Just as I was muttering to myself, the captain's cabin door burst open.
1000645384.korean: - 내 혼잣말과 동시에 함장실 문이 벌컥 열렸다.

1000645387.english: Just in time. Good, today will be the day I am reborn as the Sword of the Savior.
1000645387.korean: 마침 있군. 좋다, 오늘은 내가 구원자의 검으로써 새로 태어나는 날이 될 거다.

1000645388.english: W-wait a minute! Listen to me…! That was a slip of the tongue-
1000645388.korean: 자, 잠깐만요! 제 말 좀 들어봐요…! 그건 말이 헛나온-

1000645389.english: Do you think I'm a fool!

1000645390.english: - Azazel aside, Saraqael wearing clothes like that...?

1000645391.english: - I didn’t even notice when she’d come in; Veronica was standing quietly beside me, who was in a state of confusion.
1000645391.korean: - 어느새 들어왔는지, 베로니카는 혼란에 빠진 내 옆에 조용히 서있었다.

1000645393.english: - As always, we exchanged glances and listened to the angels' story to find out what on earth was going on.
1000645393.korean: - 언제나처럼 시선을 교환하고, 대체 무슨 일인지 천사들의 이야기에 귀를 기울였다.

1000645394.english: I don't understand. Why is it not allowed?
1000645394.korean: 이해할 수 없군. 왜 안된다는 거지?

1000645395.english: I am the judge of the denomination. I should be fully qualified to receive the Savior's blessing.
1000645395.korean: 나는 교단의 심판관이다. 구원자의 축복을 받을 자격이 충분할텐데.

1000645398.english: Lord Azazel, possessiveness and jealousy are natural emotions, but if they go too far, they can easily be tainted by darkness.
1000645398.korean: 아자젤님. 독점욕과 질투는 자연스러운 감정이나, 도를 넘는다면 어둠에 물들기 쉽습니다.

1000645400.english: Ha. So that's how it was.

1000645401.english: Azazel, you... weren't worried about the Judge receiving the Savior's favor, but rather that the man known as the Savior would fall deeply for a woman named me. ...Interesting.
1000645401.korean: 아자젤 너는… 심판관이 구원자의 총애를 받는 것이 아니라, 구원자라는 남성이 나라는 여성에게 푹 빠질 것을 걱정한 거였어. …재미있군.

1000645403.english: I'm getting even more curious... Savior.

1000645404.english: Fill me with your blessing. Through that fullness of power, Saraqael the Judge shall be reborn as the sword of the Savior.
1000645404.korean: 네 축복으로 나를 가득 채워라. 그 충만한 힘을 통해, 심판관 사라카엘은 구원자의 검으로 다시 태어나리니.

1000645406.english: That is quite an incredible thing to say.

1000645407.english: - I retold my memories amidst the chaos.

1000645408.english: - I'm pretty sure… when we spent the first night together, I think Azazel said shyly that this was just a blessing…
1000645408.korean: - 분명… 처음 밤을 보냈을 때, 아자젤이 부끄러워하며 이건 축복일 뿐이라고 했던 것 같기도…

1000645409.english: Come, Savior. Your sword is ready at any moment.
1000645409.korean: 오거라, 구원자여. 너의 검은 언제든 준비되어 있다.

1000645410.english: - I looked up, hoping for a helping hand, but Veronica merely shook me head slightly, me face betraying a sense of resignation.
1000645410.korean: - 구원의 손길을 바라며 올려다 봤지만, 베로니카는 모든 것을 포기한 얼굴로 작게 고개를 저을 뿐이었다.

1000645411.english: - … I guess there’s nothing we can do about it.

1000645415.english: - Just as I was about to continue the performance with renewed momentum, the awkwardness I had been holding back surged at Veronica's subtle gaze.
1000645415.korean: - 탄력받은 연기를 이어나가려는 순간, 베로니카의 미묘한 눈빛에 참고 있던 민망함이 몰려왔다.

1000645417.english: - While Veronica let out a deep sigh at the sight of me smiling awkwardly, Azazel and Saraqael couldn't wait and started bickering again.
1000645417.korean: - 민망하게 웃음짓는 나를 보며 베로니카가 한숨을 포옥 내쉬는 사이, 그새를 못 기다리고 아자젤과 사라카엘은 또다시 티격태격하기 시작했다.

1000645418.english: - Okay. Those two can ask Veronica for a favor as usual, and in the meantime, I...
1000645418.korean: - 좋아. 저 둘은 평소처럼 베로니카한테 부탁하고, 나는 그 틈에...

1000645419.english: … Oh Light. Please do not forgive me.

1000645420.english: - I was trying to sneak out of the captain's quarters when I was suddenly grabbed by the back of the neck and dragged onto the bed.
1000645420.korean: - 몰래 함장실을 빠져나가려던 나는 뒷목을 덥석 붙잡혀 침대로 질질 끌려가고 말았다.

1000645421.english: My patience has its limits, Savior.

1000645422.english: Before I surrender myself to darkness and fall because of those angels... please bestow your Savior's blessing upon me.
1000645422.korean: 저 천사님들 때문에 이대로 어둠에 몸을 맡겨 타락해버리기 전에… 제게 구원자님의 축복을 내려주십시오.

1000645423.english: Is the Inquisitor trying to receive the blessing before the Judge…!
1000645423.korean: 이단심문관이 심판관보다 앞서 축복을 받으려 하는 건가…!

1000645425.english: - Just as I thought Azazel was flying toward me, my vision went dark along with a soft touch on my face.
1000645425.korean: - 아자젤이 내 쪽으로 날아오나 싶더니, 얼굴에 부드러운 감촉과 함께 눈 앞이 어두워졌다.

1000645426.english: Oh, not today! I can't enter the swimsuit contest either, so I'm going to spend it with my partner...!
1000645426.korean: 오, 오늘은 안 돼요! 수영복 콘테스트에도 못 나가게 됐으니까 반려랑 같이 보낼거라구요…!

1000645427.english: - … … The Light said firmly, “Your children, the angels, symbolize benevolence and mercy.”
1000645427.korean: - ……빛께서 단호히 가로되, 당신의 자손인 천사들은 자애와 자비를 상징하니.

1000645428.english: I never told you not to do that, but...
1000645428.korean: 그러지 말라는 말씀을 드린 적은 없습니다만.

1000645429.english: Your vision has blurred in the darkness.

1000645430.english: - Even if the lambs wander and are stained with darkness, they can return once again to the embrace of the light…
1000645430.korean: - 어린 양들이 길을 헤매어 어둠에 물들지라도, 다시금 빛의 품으로 돌아올 수 있노라…

1000645432.english: Hehe, companion… tickle- W-what are you doing, Saraqael…?!
1000645432.korean: 후후, 반려… 간지럽- 무, 뭐하는 건가요, 사라카엘…?!

1000645433.english: - Giving thanks for the boundless grace of light, walk the path of spiritual seeking…
1000645433.korean: - 끝을 모르는 빛의 은혜에 감사하며, 구도의 길을 갈 지어다…

1000645434.english: Hmph. Go ahead and do that as much as you want.

1000645435.english: Because the upper body is not needed to receive a blessing.

1000645436.english: - No matter how strong my physical abilities are, the Order's Judge is an insurmountable enemy.
1000645436.korean: - 아무리 내 신체능력이 강하다고 해도, 교단의 심판관은 항거 불능의 적.

1000645437.english: - All I could do was offer a prayer to the Light. Ah, Light. Your apostle is doing well on earth…
1000645437.korean: - 내가 할 수 있는 것이라곤 빛께 기도를 올리는 것 뿐이었다. 아아, 빛이시여. 당신의 사도는 지상에서 잘 지내고 있습니다…

1000645438.english: - Ah, Light. Your apostles and descendants are living happily on earth…
1000645438.korean: - 아아, 빛이시여. 당신의 사도와 자손들은 지상에서 행복하게 지내고 있습니다…

1000645440.english: I'm also worried, and so is Azazel... Oh.

1000645441.english: That's the way to do it.

1000645445.english: I'll definitely go. And instead... it's not really a replacement, but I have a request.
1000645445.korean: 꼭 갈게. 그리고 대신… 이라고 하긴 뭐한데, 부탁이 있어.

1000645446.english: It seems Angel and Ramiel have gone back.

1000645450.english: Are you all done? Then I'll go in... whoa.

1000645456.english: No. It's just the usual Azazel.

1000645457.english: I like that kind of Azazel.

1000645458.english: I think that side of her—the one she only shows to me—is Azazel’s true self.
1000645458.korean: 나한테만 보여주는, 그런 모습이 아자젤의 진짜 모습이라고 생각하니까.

1000645462.english: What is it? Is this a hallucination?

1000645468.english: Oh, oh, oh, I know. I know it too well. I got a little confused for a moment. Haha...
1000645468.korean: 아, 아아아알지. 너무 잘 알지. 잠깐 헷갈렸어. 하하…

1000645472.english: Oh, come to think of it, didn't you say you were looking for the scriptures?
1000645472.korean: 아, 그러고보니 경전을 찾는다고 하지 않았어?

1000645474.english: Still, maybe just one... like an angel, or Ramiel...

1000645475.english: ...Thank you. Thank you for believing me.

1000645477.english: That's right. I've been wanting to ask since earlier, are you participating in the swimsuit contest?
1000645477.korean: 맞다. 아까부터 묻고 싶었는데, 수영복 콘테스트 참가하는 거야?

1000645483.english: Okay. Well, saying "bless you" like that feels a bit embarrassing.
1000645483.korean: 알았어. 그럼 축복을… 이런식으로 말하니까 좀 낯부끄럽네.

1000645485.english: I might have been a bit deflated, come to think of it.
1000645485.korean: 확실히 좀 기가 죽어 있었는지도 모르겠네.

1000645489.english: Are you doing it all by yourself without taking a break?

1000645491.english: That's a lot. I'll help you.

1000645495.english: That's right. I'll tell Audrey right now. Swimsuit.

1000645498.english: Yeah. I'll be looking forward to it.

1000645499.english: I wasn't really questioning your faith, was I?
1000645499.korean: 벼, 별로 신앙심을 의심한 건 아닌데?

1000645504.english: ...Alright, Judge. Let my blessing fill your entire body.
1000645504.korean: …좋다, 심판관이여. 나의 축복을, 그 몸 가득히 채우도록 해라.

1000645505.english: You're with me too. Archangel, Azazel.

1000645510.english: Just a moment. Everyone's talking about me...

1000645513.english: Come to think of it, Saraqael's attitude had changed a bit...

1000645516.english: It would be better to think about it a bit more...

1000645519.english: - What should I do for the rest of today?

1000645520.english: - Shall we go for a walk to clear our heads?
1000645520.korean: - 기분 전환이나 할 겸 조금 걸을까.

1000645522.english: - As I came out of the captain's quarters, I saw Poi and Draculina whispering something not far away.
1000645522.korean: - 함장실에서 나오니 멀지 않은 곳에서 포이와 드라큐리나가 무언가 속닥이고 있는 모습이 보였다.

1000645523.english: - Draculina flinched for a moment upon hearing my voice and strode over.
1000645523.korean: - 내 목소리를 듣자 잠시 움찔한 드라큐리나가 성큼성큼 걸어왔다.

1000645526.english: Hey, you worked really hard this time too...

1000645528.english: - As I stood there with a question mark floating above my head, Poi, who had been quietly watching, ran over and hugged me around the waist.
1000645528.korean: - 내가 머리에 물음표를 띄우고 있자 가만히 지켜보던 포이가 달려와 허리를 끌어안았다.

1000645530.english: Did Master accept this kid and come to serve him?

1000645531.english: Hey! How can you talk like that!
1000645531.korean: 야! 말을 그런 식으로 하면 어떡해!

1000645532.english: Huh? It's exactly what we bet on!

1000645533.english: Nya ha ha, then Poi wins~ Though it's an obvious result.
1000645533.korean: 냐하핫, 그럼 포이의 승리네~ 당연한 결과지만.

1000645535.english: Not yet! The vacation isn't over yet!

1000645536.english: Hmm~? To Poi, it looks like the bet is already over~
1000645536.korean: 흐응~? 포이가 보기엔 이미 끝난 내기 같은데~

1000645537.english: Shut up! Shut your mouth! What do you know!
1000645537.korean: 시끄러워, 입 다물어! 네가 뭘 안다고 그래!

1000645538.english: You're human, right? You like me, right?
1000645538.korean: 인간, 맞지? 너, 나 좋아하는 거 맞지?

1000645539.english: Nya ha ha, Master♡ Guess what Poi is wearing~♡

1000645540.english: - I remembered the promise I had forgotten with Poi. Still...
1000645540.korean: - 잊고 있던 포이와의 약속이 떠올랐다. 그래도…

1000645542.english: - Poi grabbed my hand, who was glancing nervously at Draculina, who was trembling with anger, and started running.
1000645542.korean: - 포이는 분이 풀리지 않아 부들거리던 드라큐리나의 눈치를 보는 내 손을 잡고 달리기 시작했다.

1000645543.english: - After arriving at the captain’s cabin in the blink of an eye, she pressed her finger against my lips to stop me from protesting out of politeness.
1000645543.korean: - 순식간에 함장실에 도착한 뒤, 예의상 항의하려는 내 입술을 손가락으로 눌렀다.

1000645544.english: Shh. They'll be chasing you soon.

1000645545.english: - "She has really sharp ears," Po-i whispered as she picked up a notepad and a pen from my desk.
1000645545.korean: - 걔, 귀가 엄청 좋으니까요. 하고 속삭인 포이가 내 책상에서 메모지와 펜을 집었다.

1000645546.english: [Master, you said you would make a mess of Poi, right?]

1000645547.english: - … I don't think I remember saying that… …

1000645548.english: - As I nodded reluctantly, Poi's smile deepened.
1000645548.korean: - 내가 떨떠름하게 고개를 끄덕이자 포이의 미소가 짙어졌다.

1000645551.english: - After covering Poi, who had fallen asleep as if fainted, with a blanket, I put on a robe.
1000645551.korean: - 기절하듯 잠든 포이에게 이불을 덮어준 뒤 가운을 걸쳤다.

1000645552.english: - As I opened the captain's quarters door just as Foy said, there was…
1000645552.korean: - 포이가 말한대로 함장실 문을 열자, 그곳엔…

1000645554.english: - Draculina, who was sitting slumped in the hallway in front of the door, looked up at me blankly.
1000645554.korean: - 문 앞 복도에 주저앉아 있던 드라큐리나가 나를 멍하니 올려다 보았다.

1000645555.english: Wait, just a moment. This is…

1000645556.english: - Poie definitely told me to do it "just like she does," but... I guess I still need to put some effort into it.
1000645556.korean: - 분명 포이는 '자기한테처럼' 해보라고 했지만… 그래도 좀 신경은 써야겠지.

1000645558.english: - I grabbed Draculina by the wrist, pulled her to her feet, and led her into the captain’s cabin.
1000645558.korean: - 드라큐리나의 손목을 잡아 일으켜 함장실 안으로 이끌었다.

1000645559.english: - Before she could even react, I gently shoved Draculina against the wall.
1000645559.korean: - 미처 반응하기도 전에 끌려들어온 드라큐리나를 벽으로 살짝 밀쳤다.

1000645560.english: - At my words, Draculina's gaze turned toward the messy bed where Poi was asleep.
1000645560.korean: - 내 말에 드라큐리나의 시선이 포이가 잠들어있는, 어질러진 침대 쪽으로 향했다.

1000645563.english: - As I roughly wrapped my arms around Draculina’s waist—she had given a barely perceptible nod—a gasp of joy, for some reason, escaped from between her sharp fangs.
1000645563.korean: - 보일듯 말듯 고개를 끄덕인 드라큐리나의 허리를 거칠게 감싸 안자, 날카로운 송곳니 사이로 어쩐지 기쁨이 느껴지는 탄성이 흘러 나왔다.

1000645564.english: - I hadn't noticed it until now, but now that I'm conscious of it, drowsiness is pouring down. I guess fatigue really had built up...
1000645564.korean: - 지금까지는 느끼지 못했지만 의식하니 졸음이 쏟아진다. 역시 피로가 쌓였었나…

1000645565.english: - As I operated the panel to change the status to sleep, the captain's cabin door locked with a small sound.
1000645565.korean: - 패널을 조작해 상태를 수면중으로 바꾸자 작은 소리와 함께 함장실 문이 잠겼다.

1000645566.english: - Those who want to come in will still come in, but... just for today should be fine. After all, Azaz made it.
1000645566.korean: - 이래도 들어올 사람은 들어오겠지만… 오늘 하루정도는 괜찮겠지. 아자즈가 만든거니까.

1000645567.english: - As I lay down on the bed in a corner of the captain's quarters, my eyelids closed on their own.
1000645567.korean: - 함장실 한 켠에 마련된 침대에 몸을 뉘이자 저절로 눈꺼풀이 감겨온다.

1000645568.english: - Before I could even think about anything, I fell into a deep sleep.
1000645568.korean: - 뭔가 생각하기도 전에, 그대로 깊은 잠 속으로 빠져들었다.

1000645571.english: Haha, that's right. Right here… the potential of humanity lies dormant.
1000645571.korean: 후후, 맞아요. 바로 여기에… 인류의 가능성이 잠들어있죠.

1000645572.english: - I wonder how long I had been asleep. I briefly regained consciousness at the sound of someone whispering.
1000645572.korean: - 얼마쯤 잠들어 있었을까. 속닥이는 누군가의 목소리에 얼핏 정신이 들었다.

1000645573.english: Alright then… would you like to check it out?

1000645576.english: - I sprang to my feet at the extremely unsettling touch I felt in my lower body.
1000645576.korean: - 하반신에서 느껴지는 몹시 불온한 손길에 자리를 박차고 일어났다.

1000645578.english: - Seeing me pull up my pants, which had slipped halfway down, Azaz smiled broadly.
1000645578.korean: - 어느새 반쯤 흘러내린 바지를 추스르는 나를 보며, 아자즈는 방긋 웃었다.

1000645579.english: Hehe, really? If I had been asleep when the Commander came to visit during the day, I probably wouldn't have woken up.
1000645579.korean: 후후, 그래요? 사령관이 낮에 찾아왔을때 자고 있었으면, 저는 아마 안깼을텐데.

1000645580.english: - Azaz continued speaking, paying no attention to me choking and coughing.
1000645580.korean: - 사레가 들러 콜록대는 나를 신경쓰지도 않고 아자즈는 계속해서 말을 이었다.

1000645581.english: Looking back, I feel a bit regretful. It was an opportunity to have a fresh experience...
1000645581.korean: 돌이켜보면 조금 아쉽기도 해요. 신선한 경험을 할 수 있는 기회였는데…

1000645582.english: Heh, but the commander is really a gentleman. He didn't just leave; he stayed with me until the next day.
1000645582.korean: 후훗, 그래도 사령관은 정말 젠틀해요. 그대로 가버리지 않고 다음날까지 같이 있어줬잖아요.

1000645583.english: Honestly, I never thought he would keep his promise.
1000645583.korean: 솔직히, 약속을 지켜줄 거라고 생각도 못했구요.

1000645584.english: So you confirmed it at that time...

1000645586.english: Yes. I… truly saw infinite possibilities and hope.
1000645586.korean: 그래요. 저는… 정말로 무한한 가능성과 희망을 봤어요.

1000645588.english: The living Master is so cool, too…

1000645589.english: - Eternity's arm, which was clinging to the leg, tightened its grip.
1000645589.korean: - 다리에 엉겨붙어있던 이터니티의 팔에 점점 더 힘이 들어갔다.

1000645590.english: Right? Because life is truly wonderful.

1000645591.english: - Whether she sensed that her living master would become her former master or not, Eternity suddenly relaxed her grip, crawled up, and perched on his stomach.
1000645591.korean: - 살아 계신 주인님이 살아 계셨던 주인님이 될 거라는 것을 눈치챈건지 어쨌는지, 별안간 팔에서 힘을 뺀 이터니티가 기어올라와 배 위에 걸터 앉았다.

1000645592.english: - In the eyes silently looking down at me, there was nothing but pure and intense affection.
1000645592.korean: - 말없이 나를 내려다보는 눈동자엔 순수하고 강렬한 애정뿐.

1000645593.english: - Even when I slowly got up, Eternity surprisingly stayed quietly in my arms.
1000645593.korean: - 천천히 몸을 일으켜도 의외로 이터니티는 얌전히 안겨 있었다.

1000645594.english: Oh, did I disturb your sleep by any chance?

1000645595.english: I'm sorry. I was distracted by the Commander and completely forgot.

1000645597.english: - As I turned her around and laid her down on the bed, a sigh of anticipation escaped her full lips.
1000645597.korean: - 몸을 돌려 이터니티를 침대에 눞히자, 작은 입술 사이로 기대감이 섞인 탄성이 흘러나왔다.

1000645598.english: Hmm... then I'll get some sleep- Eek?!
1000645598.korean: 으음… 그럼 저는 좀 자고 있을- 꺅?!

1000645599.english: - I grabbed Azaz by the waist just as she was getting up with a twinkle in her eye and laid her down next to Eternity.
1000645599.korean: - 눈웃음을 지으며 일어나던 아자즈의 허리를 잡아채서 이터니티의 옆에 눞혔다.

1000645600.english: - Azaz's eyes, which had been blinking in surprise at my words, slowly curved.
1000645600.korean: - 내 말에 놀라 깜빡이던 아자즈의 두 눈이 천천히 휘어졌다.

1000645601.english: Yes. This is the first time my heart has been this pounding, too.
1000645601.korean: 네. 저도 이렇게 두근거리는 건 처음이에요.

1000645602.english: - Just as I slowly leaned in, about to touch her lips with mine, a mesmerizing voice made me freeze.
1000645602.korean: - 천천히 몸을 숙여 입술과 입술이 마주치려는 찰나, 황홀한 목소리에 움직임을 멈췄다.

1000645604.english: More comfortable than death... and more wondrous than life...

1000645605.english: - I exchanged a smile with Azaz as I watched Eternity, who had somehow ended up burying her face in my pillow.
1000645605.korean: - 어느새 내 베개에 얼굴을 파묻고 있는 이터니티를 보며 아자즈와 마주 웃었다.

1000645606.english: Hehe. Um, should I take a nap for a bit?

1000645607.english: - This time, instead of speaking, I decided to answer in a different way.
1000645607.korean: - 이번에는 말 대신, 다른 식으로 대답하기로 했다.

1000645608.english: - What should I do for the rest of today?

1000645609.english: - Since the mission she was originally on has been put on hold for now, she must still be on the Orca.
1000645609.korean: - 원래 수행하던 임무는 일단 중지시켰으니까 아직 오르카에 있겠지.

1000645611.english: My Lord, weren't you on vacation?

1000645612.english: - When I went to the room, Dragon, who had looked slightly surprised, soon smiled and welcomed me.
1000645612.korean: - 방으로 찾아가자 살짝 놀란 얼굴을 했던 용은 이내 웃으며 나를 맞아주었다.

1000645613.english: The mission was suspended, so I was thinking about the next plan.
1000645613.korean: 임무가 중지되어서, 다음 계획을 생각해보고 있었소.

1000645614.english: That is enough. I was just about to stop working as well.

1000645615.english: If I do the work, won't my lord also want to work with me without resting?
1000645615.korean: 소관이 일을 하면, 주군도 쉬지 않고 같이 일을 하려 할 것 아니오.

1000645616.english: - Dragon approached me with a small smile at the banter.
1000645616.korean: - 너스레에 작게 미소지은 용이 내게 다가섰다.

1000645617.english: It has been a long time since I have met my lord face to face like this.

1000645618.english: - Dragon, who had been tidying my clothes with practiced ease, shook her head slightly.
1000645618.korean: - 익숙한 손놀림으로 내 옷매무새를 정리해주던 용은 작게 고개를 저었다.

1000645619.english: I am already receiving more affection than I deserve.
1000645619.korean: 소관은 이미 분에 넘치는 애정을 받고있소.

1000645621.english: The unit members... missed their lord very much.

1000645622.english: - Dragon, who had even gone so far as to fix her hair, cautiously opened her mouth.
1000645622.korean: - 기어코 머리카락까지 정리해준 용이 조심스럽게 입을 열었다.

1000645623.english: Could you spend some time with your unit members, even if just for a moment?
1000645623.korean: 잠시라도 좋으니, 부대원들과 시간을 보내줄 수 있겠소?

1000645626.english: Speaking of grilling... you know very well that I won't be able to refuse.
1000645626.korean: 그릴 말하면… 소관이 거절하지 못하리란 걸, 잘 알지 않소.

1000645628.english: - Dragon’s expression softened as she finally relaxed at my words.
1000645628.korean: - 내 말에 간신히 마음을 놓은 용의 표정이 풀어졌다.

1000645630.english: I will prepare a bath, so it would be good to soak in the warm water and relieve your fatigue.
1000645630.korean: 목욕물을 받아놓을테니, 따끈한 물에 몸을 담그고 피로를 푸는 것이 좋겠소.

1000645631.english: D-don't say such things. Such things are…
1000645631.korean: 그, 그런 말 하지 마시오. 그런 것은…

1000645634.english: - As I came out of the small bathroom attached to Dragon's room after finishing my bath…
1000645634.korean: - 용의 방에 딸린 작은 욕실에서 목욕을 마치고 나오자…

1000645635.english: I received a little help from Chef Sowan.

1000645636.english: - The sight of the neat meal with steam rising from it made me hungry.
1000645636.korean: - 김이 모락모락 올라오는 정갈한 밥상에 허기가 동했다.

1000645637.english: - We finished our meal together, sharing military strategies, jokes, future plans, and small talk.
1000645637.korean: - 군사 전략과 농담, 향후 방침과 잡담을 나누며 함께 식사를 마쳤다.

1000645638.english: - After half-forcing me to sit on the sofa while I tried to help and finishing the cleanup, Dragon carefully sat down beside me.
1000645638.korean: - 도와주려는 나를 반강제로 소파에 앉히고 뒷정리를 마친 용은, 조심스레 내 곁에 앉았다.

1000645640.english: - Without a word, I gently wrapped my arms around Dragon’s shoulders as I leaned in.
1000645640.korean: - 말없이 천천히 몸을 기대는 용의 어깨를 끌어안았다.

1000645641.english: - As I brushed her jet-black hair, which had fallen across her face, behind her ears, the Navy admiral—who had been commanding her unit with such authority just moments before—closed her eyes gently, like a girl lost in a dream.
1000645641.korean: - 얼굴 앞으로 흘러내린, 빠져들 것 같이 검은 머리카락을 귀 뒤로 넘겨주자, 바로 얼마 전까지 호령하며 부대를 이끌던 해군 대장님은 꿈꾸는 소녀처럼 스르르 눈을 감았다.

1000645642.english: Thank you for granting my unreasonable request.

1000645643.english: Hehe, the troops are probably resting on the nearby beach.
1000645643.korean: 후후, 부대원들은 아마 근처 해안에서 쉬고 있을거요.

1000645647.english: - As I headed toward the sandy beach, the Horizon squad members who had gathered from afar ran toward me.
1000645647.korean: - 백사장으로 향하자, 저 멀리서 모여던 호라이즌 부대원들이 내게 달려왔다.

1000645648.english: It's the real commander... I almost forgot what he looked like...

1000645649.english: Hmph. What were you doing instead of coming over right away?

1000645650.english: - As the Horizon members surrounded me, the atmosphere instantly became boisterous.
1000645650.korean: - 호라이즌 대원들이 나를 둘러싸자 순식간에 분위기가 왁자지껄해졌다.

1000645651.english: - I made eye contact with the Sirene who was hesitating behind those squad members.
1000645651.korean: - 그런 대원들 뒤에서 우물쭈물하던 세이렌과 눈이 마주쳤다.

1000645656.english: Now's the time, Vice-Captain. Just do it exactly as practiced...!

1000645657.english: - Seiren, who had been struggling with intense inner conflict due to Undine’s whisper, let out a small sigh as if she had made up her mind.
1000645657.korean: - 옆에 있던 운디네의 속삭임에 심한 내적갈등을 겪던 세이렌은 마음을 정한듯 작게 숨을 내쉬었다.

1000645662.english: The book I studied said it's good to hide your feelings...
1000645662.korean: 공부했던 책에서는 마음을 숨기는 게 좋댔는데…

1000645663.english: I... I didn't want to do that...

1000645664.english: Honestly, I wanted to tell you that I missed you...

1000645666.english: What? If it was going to be like this anyway, why did you even practice that? You stupid Undine.
1000645666.korean: 뭐야. 어차피 이럴거면 그건 왜 연습한거야? 바보 운디네.

1000645667.english: Hey, I'm telling you, it would have gone better if you had just done it like you practiced!
1000645667.korean: 여, 연습한대로 했으면 더 잘됐을 거라구!

1000645668.english: Commander! I missed Neri so much, too!

1000645669.english: Neri! We agreed to do it in order!

1000645670.english: - Starting with Neri, the rest of the squad members also rushed at me.
1000645670.korean: - 네리를 시작으로 나머지 대원들도 내게 달려들었다.

1000645671.english: - Undine and Thetis in my arms, Neri on my shoulder…
1000645671.korean: - 양 팔엔 운디네와 테티스, 어깨 위에는 네리…

1000645672.english: - Even Sirene, who had been hesitating for a moment, hugged me tightly around the waist in front of me.
1000645672.korean: - 잠시 망설이던 세이렌까지 앞에서 내 허리를 꼭 끌어 안았다.

1000645673.english: - I spoke to Dragon, who was smiling while hanging a bunch of crew members from its body, looking like some kind of combination robot.
1000645673.korean: - 대원들을 주렁주렁 매달고 합체로봇 같은 꼴이 된 채로 미소를 짓고 있는 용에게 말을 걸었다.

1000645676.english: We're competing to see who gets to the other shore first!
1000645676.korean: 저기 반대편 해안까지 누가 먼저 가나 시합하는 거야!

1000645677.english: You idiot! If you do that, you'll lose your energy and won't be able to do anything afterwards!
1000645677.korean: 바보야! 그러면 힘 빠져서 그 다음에 아무것도 못하잖아!

1000645678.english: Huh? Hehe, it's okay, it's okay~ Neri won't get tired from that.
1000645678.korean: 응? 헤헷, 괜찮아 괜찮아~ 네리는 그정도로는 안 지쳐.

1000645679.english: S-Even the Commander... doesn't get tired from that. Yeah...
1000645679.korean: 사, 사령관도… 그정도로는 안 지쳐. 응…

1000645680.english: It's nice to play, but how about we have a meal first?
1000645680.korean: 노는 것도 좋지만, 먼저 식사를 하는 게 어떻겠소.

1000645681.english: I will go prepare a simple snack.

1000645682.english: That is impossible. The troops would be happier to have their lord by their side, too.
1000645682.korean: 그럴리가 있겠소. 부대원들도 주군이 있어주는 걸 더 기뻐할 것이오.

1000645683.english: Eh~ Neri likes playing with the Captain too, though~
1000645683.korean: 에~ 네리는 대장님이랑 노는 것도 좋은데~

1000645684.english: It has been a long time since I met my lord. As much as I have missed you all this time, feel free to be spoiled to your heart's content today.
1000645684.korean: 오랜만에 주군을 만났지 않소. 그동안 그리워했던 만큼, 오늘은 마음껏 응석부려도 좋소.

1000645686.english: If you don't mind, how about we stay together at the Horizon accommodations tonight?
1000645686.korean: 혹시 괜찮으면, 오늘은 호라이즌 숙소에서 함께 묵는 게… 어떻겠소?

1000645688.english: Joe, that's a good idea. If you tidy up the bed, the Commander will be able to get enough sleep.
1000645688.korean: 조, 좋은 생각이에요. 침대 정리하면 사령관님도 충분히 주무실 수 있을 거예요.

1000645690.english: Hehe, Neri has to sleep with her head on the commander's arm~
1000645690.korean: 헤헹, 네리는 사령관 팔 베고 자야지~

1000645691.english: Then, as for the other arm, I will specially—

1000645696.english: … Ah! Well, if the others are okay with it…

1000645698.english: Neri, I think this is the first time I've seen the Vice Captain speak so proactively.
1000645698.korean: 네리, 부함장님이 이렇게 적극적으로 말하는 거 처음 보는 것 같아.

1000645700.english: Good. It’s not exactly according to plan, but it’s desirable.

1000645701.english: Is it because I missed you so desperately?

1000645703.english: Did Undine write down what she wants to do when she meets the Commander too?!
1000645703.korean: 운디네도 사령관 만나면 하고 싶은 거 적어놨읍?!

1000645704.english: Hmm... Vice Captain, what are you trying to do next to the Commander?
1000645704.korean: 흐응… 부함장님, 사령관 옆에서 뭘 하려고 그러는 거예요?

1000645707.english: It’s been a really long time since I’ve seen the unit members looking so happy...
1000645707.korean: 부대원들이 저리 즐거워하는 모습… 정말 오랜만에 보오.

1000645709.english: - I sat on the sandy beach, following Dragon's touch.

1000645710.english: - Holding my hand and resting her head on my shoulder, Yong’s gaze never strayed from the team members as they played happily.
1000645710.korean: - 내 손을 잡고 어깨에 머리를 기댄 용의 시선은, 즐겁게 뛰어 노는 대원들에게서 떨어질 줄을 몰랐다.

1000645711.english: - We held hands and just watched the squad members until Neri came to call us to play together.
1000645711.korean: - 같이 놀자며 네리가 부르러 오기 전까지, 우리는 손을 맞잡고 대원들의 모습을 그저 바라보고 있었다.

1000645713.english: - I shook my head to snap out of it. Alright then…
1000645713.korean: - 정신을 차리기 위해 고개를 흔들었다. 자, 그럼…

1000645715.english: - I don't know why, but I feel like this is really my last chance.
1000645715.korean: - 이유는 잘 모르겠지만, 이번이 정말 마지막 기회라는 생각이 든다.

1000645717.english: - Right… summer vacation and hell training are practically synonymous…!
1000645717.korean: - 그래… 여름 휴가와 지옥훈련은 그야말로 동의어…!

1000645718.english: - I sent a message to Marie on the panel, feeling an inexplicable sense of uplift.
1000645718.korean: - 알 수 없는 고양감을 느끼며 패널로 마리에게 메시지를 보냈다.

1000645721.english: Leave the cannons to me; I can shoulder the other heavy burdens as well!
1000645721.korean: 포는 제게 맡겨주십쇼, 다른 무거운 것도 제가 짊어져도 되지 말임다!

1000645722.english: Brownie, what are you talking about!

1000645723.english: I'll help you! We're Steel Line, so we should share the hardships!
1000645723.korean: 제가 도와드릴게요! 저희는 스틸라인이니까, 힘든 것도 나눠야죠!

1000645725.english: As expected, the camaraderie in Steel Line is the best.

1000645727.english: I've never once regretted being assigned to the Steel Line...
1000645727.korean: 난 스틸라인에 배속된 걸 한 번도 후회한 적 없어...

1000645728.english: My heart... is filled with camaraderie and honor...

1000645730.english: Then get commissioned. I'll take good care of you.

1000645731.english: Ah, the finish line is in sight...!

1000645735.english: The vacation I originally planned was one week, but...

1000645736.english: When I told my subordinates that we could rest for two weeks thanks to the arrangements made by the Commander and Captain Marie, their morale soared.
1000645736.korean: 사령관 각하와 마리 대장님의 안배로 2주일을 쉴 수 있다고 했더니, 부하들의 기세가 하늘을 찌르고 있습니다.

1000645737.english: - I remember that as soon as I told Mari I was going to join the boot camp, the other Steel Line members rushed over and begged me to reconsider...
1000645737.korean: - 분명 지옥훈련에 참여하겠다고 마리에게 전하자마자 다른 스틸라인 대원들이 달려와서 처절하게 다시 생각해달라고 했었는데...

1000645741.english: I apologize, Your Excellency. Since Your Excellency participated—

1000645742.english: Please forgive us for proceeding in an abbreviated manner.

1000645743.english: I will officially issue the sandbags right now. Stand in your places!
1000645743.korean: 지금이라도 정식으로 모래주머니를 불출하겠습니다. 제자리에, 서!

1000645744.english: Hmm. I will personally pack Your Excellency's sandbags. Just a light 40kg...
1000645744.korean: 음. 각하의 모래주머니는 제가 직접 채워드리겠습니다. 가볍게 40kg만...

1000645745.english: - After being forced to wear sandbags, I heard the bad news that the run had been extended by 40 km.
1000645745.korean: - 반 강제로 모래주머니를 차고 나서, 구보가 40KM 연장되었다는 비보가 들려왔다.

1000645746.english: - The schedule that followed was truly disastrous, and I decided not to think about it because I wanted to erase it from my memory.
1000645746.korean: - 그 이후에 이어진 스케쥴은 그야말로 참혹한 것으로, 기억에서 지워버리고 싶기에 떠올리지 않기로 했다.

1000645749.english: Your Excellency, may I come in?

1000645750.english: Um... Your Excellency. Are you alright?

1000645751.english: - After finishing training and having a meal at the campsite, I was passed out in my tent when Red Hood came to find me.
1000645751.korean: - 훈련을 마치고, 숙영지에서 식사를 마친 뒤 텐트에서 뻗어있던 중 레드후드가 찾아왔다.

1000645753.english: - As I took the ice pack and placed it on my still-trembling legs, a groan escaped my lips involuntarily.
1000645753.korean: - 얼음주머니를 받아 아직도 후들거리는 다리에 가져다 대자, 나도 모르게 신음소리가 흘러나왔다.

1000645754.english: I, I am sorry. I was just so happy that Your Excellency participated in the training that...
1000645754.korean: 죄, 죄송합니다. 각하께서 훈련에 참여해주신게 기뻐서 그만…

1000645755.english: - As I rubbed my trembling legs with an ice pack, I felt a sweet scent tickle the tip of my nose.
1000645755.korean: - 얼음주머니로 후들거리는 다리를 문지르다 달콤한 향기가 코끝을 간지르는 것을 느꼈다.

1000645757.english: Um... because of the smell of my sweat... I was worried that Your Excellency might be displeased, so just a little...
1000645757.korean: 그… 제 땀냄새 때문에… 각하께서 불쾌해 하실까봐, 아주 살짝…

1000645758.english: Th-that was unbecoming of a soldier. I am sorry...!

1000645759.english: - I offered Red Hood a seat and asked her, as she seemed to be feeling quite nervous for some reason.
1000645759.korean: - 왜인지 몹시 긴장한 것 같아 보이는 레드후드에게 자리를 권하며 물었다.

1000645760.english: No. This level of training is nothing—

1000645762.english: All I did was relay His Excellency's orders to my subordinates.
1000645762.korean: 제가 한 일은 그저 각하의 명령을 부하들에게 전파한 것 뿐입니다.

1000645763.english: Everything is thanks to the soldiers who fought honorably. So…
1000645763.korean: 모든 것은 명예롭게 싸워준 병사들 덕분. 그래서…

1000645764.english: Thank you, Your Excellency, for granting me this special long vacation.
1000645764.korean: 이번에 특별히 긴 휴가를 허락해주셔서 감사합니다, 각하.

1000645766.english: - As I watched Red Hood bow her head, I remembered the words I hadn’t been able to convey properly last time.
1000645766.korean: - 고개를 꾸벅 숙이는 레드후드를 보며 저번에 제대로 전하지 못한 말이 떠올랐다.

1000645767.english: Which one are you referring to?

1000645769.english: - Red Hood's face instantly turned red.

1000645770.english: - After fidgeting with her fingers for a moment, Red Hood cautiously spoke up.
1000645770.korean: - 한동안 손가락을 꼬물거리던 레드후드가 조심스레 입을 열었다.

1000645771.english: Um... Your Excellency. Please listen without misunderstanding.

1000645772.english: Wearing a swimsuit... and bringing an ice pack to Your Excellency like this is, first of all...
1000645772.korean: 수, 수영복을 입고… 이, 이렇게 얼음 주머니를 각하께 가지고 온 건 일단…

1000645773.english: It was because of the pressure from my subordinates, but... well, it's not entirely like that. So...
1000645773.korean: 부하들의 등쌀때문이었습니다만… 꼬, 꼭 그런 것만은 아닙니다. 그러니까…

1000645775.english: - I embraced a body where tempered hardness and softness coexisted.
1000645775.korean: - 단련된 단단함과 부드러움이 공존하는 몸을 품에 안았다.

1000645776.english: … Anywhere is fine as long as it is for Your Excellency.

1000645777.english: - Thanks to the massage I did diligently, the muscle pain subsided to some extent.
1000645777.korean: - 열심히 마사지를 한 덕분인지 근육통은 어느정도 잦아들었다.

1000645778.english: - The fatigue has gone away, and I even feel refreshed.

1000645779.english: - Red Hood seemed too nervous to notice, but whispering sounds and footsteps had been heard from outside the tent for a while.
1000645779.korean: - 레드후드는 긴장해서 눈치채지 못한 모양이지만, 조금 전부터 텐트 밖에서 인기척과 함께 속닥거리는 소리가 들렸다.

1000645780.english: - Hoping she had enough stamina, I gently stroked Red Hood’s cheeks, which were flushed with nervous excitement.
1000645780.korean: - 체력이 충분하기를 빌면서, 긴장과 기대감으로 화끈거리는 레드후드의 뺨을 부드럽게 쓸었다.

1000645781.english: Let's just go for a light walk.

1000645789.english: If you don't like it, just say so. I'm serious.

1000645790.english: Then... it's okay even if it's in the middle.

1000645791.english: Oh yeah, that was there. I had forgotten.

1000645794.english: How can I not get up when it's like this...?

1000645802.english: It seems like this is the first time I've seen Azaz flustered.
1000645802.korean: 아자즈가 당황하는 거, 처음 보는 것 같네.

1000645804.english: Oh, Dragon came back in a hurry this time, didn't she?

1000645805.english: Yeah. I'm going to rest from now on. Were you working?
1000645805.korean: 응. 이제부터 쉬려고. 일 하고 있었어?

1000645809.english: Sorry. I should be paying more attention.

1000645810.english: ...I want to spend a little more time alone with Dragon.
1000645810.korean: …난 용이랑 단둘이 좀 더 있고 싶은데.

1000645812.english: I'll definitely make time to hang out with my unit members during my vacation.

1000645813.english: That's good. Do you want to go with me?

1000645815.english: That's too much. I missed you too.

1000645817.english: Welcome. That must have been tough, huh?

1000645818.english: Yeah. I really wanted to see the sirens too.
1000645818.korean: 응. 나도 세이렌이 정말 보고 싶었어.

1000645819.english: ...Do you want to be a dragon? Your back is bare.

1000645822.english: Haha, you seem a little tired.

1000645823.english: During summer vacation, we have hell training. Isn't that common sense?
1000645823.korean: 여름 휴가 때는 지옥훈련을 한다. 상식이잖아?

1000645824.english: I must have been temporarily insane. Let's think about it again from the beginning.

1000645827.english: Originally... did you... really sprint... for... phew... 40 kilometers...?

1000645828.english: As expected, it wasn't, was it...? Haha...

1000645832.english: Ugh... I feel like I'm going to live.

1000645833.english: Don't worry about it. Everyone does it... wait, what?

1000645835.english: No, it smells good. Rather than that...

1000645836.english: Red Hood, you've been through a lot too.

1000645837.english: Training is one thing, but this operation...

1000645839.english: Oh yeah, there's something I didn't finish saying last time.
1000645839.korean: 맞다, 저번에 마저 말 못한 게 있는데.

1000645840.english: You look great in that swimsuit. Cute.
1000645840.korean: 수영복 입은 거, 잘 어울려. 귀여워.

1000645841.english: ...Ugh, is that a Steel Line unit tradition?

1000645842.english: The environment isn't great, but... are you okay with it?

1000645844.english: ...I'll have to think about that later.

1000645847.english: As expected, summer vacation means hell training.

1000645848.english: Should I rethink it from the beginning...?

1000645850.english: Hmm, let's think about this from the beginning again.

1000645852.english: Huhu, so the commander needs me after all, doesn't he? As a soldier, of course, but also as a woman... I... I'm sorry.&nUntil this late... That's right. I'm a bundle of complexes. A body full of flab, poor performance... Every time I think about it, I hate myself.&nAnd I'm worried that others will dislike me because of it... I hate myself even more. And yet, Commander... You told me it was okay, that I was wonderful.&n... Sniffle, so, I'll do my best. A really favorite commander... No, so I can become a truly wonderful person, just like my husband believes I am."
1000645852.korean: 후후, 역시 사령관님도 저를 필요로 하시는 거군요? 군인으로서는 물론, 여성으로서도... 저는... 죄송해요.&n이런 때까지...​ ...맞아요. 저는 컴플렉스 덩어리에요. 군살 투성이인 몸도, 저조한 성과도... 떠올릴 때마다 스스로가 싫어져요.&n그리고 다른 분들이 그것 때문에 저를 싫어할까봐... 스스로가 더 미워져요. 그런데도 사령관님은... 괜찮다고, 저는 멋지다고 말해주셨죠.&n...훌쩍, 그러니까, 힘 낼게요. 정말로 좋아하는 사령... 아니, 서방님께서 믿어주신 것처럼, 정말 멋진 사람이 되도록요.

1000645853.english: The sea... the confession... Master, this isn't just an impulse or a fleeting feeling, is it? It shouldn't be. Now I'm destined to think of you forever.
1000645853.korean: 바다… 고백… 주인님, 충동이나 한순간의 기분은 아니겠죠? 아니어야 해요.&n이렇게 전 영원히 주인님을 생각할 수 밖에 없게 됐으니.

1000645854.english: Hehe, this is… for the rest of my life… with you, Master… Hehe… Even I am embarrassed by something like this… Master, you must have really enjoyed it? Usually, people get scared… Don’t worry, Master. I will use my switch for you… for the rest of my life.
1000645854.korean: 후훗, 이건… 평생… 주인님과… 후훗… 이런 건 아무리 저라도 부끄러운데…&n주인님, 그렇게 좋으셨나 봐요? 보통은 무서워하는데… 걱정 마세요, 주인님.&n평생… 주인님을 위해 제 회초릴 사용할 테니.

1000645855.english: I knew very well that the Commander was interested in me, too... I'll keep working hard to support you right by your side, okay? As for what I'll support... you can look forward to it. See you in a little while, my Commander?
1000645855.korean: 사령관이 이 누나한테 관심 있는 건 누나도 잘 알고 있었거든...&n앞으로도 사령관 옆에서 열심히 서포트 해줄게? 어떤 걸 서포트 해줄지는...&n기대해도 좋아. 조금 이따 봐, 우리 사령관님?

1000645856.english: Commander, I have been waiting for this day. From now on, I will train both your body and mind. Just look forward to it. I will make you an even more wonderful man.
1000645856.korean: 사령관님. 전 이날이 오기만을 기다렸어요. 이젠부터 몸도 마음도 제가 단련시켜 드리겠어요.&n기대하세요. 제가 사령관님을 더 멋진 남자로 만들 테니.

1000645857.english: Um... Really? Are you giving this to me? Oh... So, I'm completely stuck now, right?&nRight? Commander... Still... You'll let me go for a walk, right? Hehe.
1000645857.korean: 어... 정말요? 이거 제게 주시는 거에요? 아... 이제 저 꼼짝도 못하는 거죠?&n그쵸? 사령관님... 그래도... 산책은 허락해주시는 거죠? 히힛.

1000645858.english: M-Your Excellency? You are truly too much. You knew I was planning to confess first... and now that things are this way... I can't refuse, can I...
1000645858.korean: 가, 각하? 정말 너무하십니다. 제가 먼저 고백하려는 걸 알고 계셨으면서…&n이렇게 되면… 거절할 수 없지 않습니까…

1000645859.english: Oh! Just a moment. Is it... really true? Aren't we going too fast? No, it's not? It seems fast, doesn't it?! Oh, really...&nIf I accept something like that... I really don't know what I'll do... I... can I take responsibility?"
1000645859.korean: 엇! 잠깐만. 지… 진짜야? 우리 너무 빠른 거 아냐? 아니라구? 빠른 거 같은데?! 아~~ 정~말…&n그런 거 받아버리면… 나 정말 어떻게 해야 할지 모르는데… 나… 책임질 수 있지?

1000645860.english: No way... are you trying to make fun of me right now? I'm fine, so... If it's a joke, please stop now...&nNo way... Thank you, Commander... I'm really happy. Thank you, Commander.
1000645860.korean: 말도 안 돼… 지금 날 놀리려는 거지? 난 괜찮으니까... 농담이라면 이제 그만해줘…&n설마… 고마워 사령관... 나 정말 행복해. 고마워 사령관.

1000645861.english: Ah... so, Master, what was it about me that you liked so much? I... Master's... Ah, I don't know, I don't know! Anyway, Master will always be Master, so just keep that in mind...!
1000645861.korean: 아... 그러니까, 주인은 내 어디가 그렇게 마음에 들었어? 난 주인의 그런...&n아, 몰라몰라! 아무튼 주인은 앞으로도 쭉~ 주인이니까, 그렇게 알고 있어...!

1000645862.english: Oh, no, I can't... If I get into a personal relationship with a fan... Ugh... You know, right? It's a secret!&nYou must never say this outside. And... thank you.
1000645862.korean: 아, 안되는데… 팬과 개인적인 관계를 맺으면… 으으… 알지? 비밀이야!&n절대로 이거 바깥에서 말하면 안돼. 그리고… 고마워.

1000645863.english: Hachiko loves her master the most. Please teach Hachiko a lot, master. And please continue to love Hachiko even when she grows up. Hehe.
1000645863.korean: 하치코는 주인님이 제~일 좋아요. 주인님도 하치코 많이 많이 가르쳐 주세요.&n그리고, 나중에 하치코가 어른이 돼도 계~속 예뻐해 주세요. 헤헤.

1000645864.english: M-Commander? This... If I accept this, we'll really become family now... Ugh... What should I do? ... No, Commander... There's no way I would refuse... Finally... my dream has come true...
1000645864.korean: 사, 사령관님? 이건… 제가 이걸 받으면, 이젠 정말 가족이 되어버리는데…&n우으… 어떻게 하죠? …아녜요, 사령관님… 제가 거절할 리 없잖아요…&n드디어... 제 꿈이 이뤄졌는걸요...

1000645865.english: My answer is...? Hohohoho! No need to ask! It's YES. Now... that's all for play. From now on, I'll treat you with sincerity... my love...
1000645865.korean: 제 대답은…? 우후후후! 물어볼 것도 없죠! YES에요. 이제... 놀이는 여기까지군요.&n앞으로는 제 진심으로 대해줄게요... 내 사랑...

1000645866.english: Thanks to you, Senior, I've learned a lot of things I didn't know before. If I take this… I can stay by your side, right? Please teach me a lot in the future too… But do I have to keep calling you Senior…? I… learned something else, though.
1000645866.korean: 선배님 덕분에 모르던 걸 많이 알게 됐어. 이거 받으면… 계속 옆에 있을 수 있는 거지?&n앞으로도 많이 알려줘… 그런데 계속 선배님이라고 불러야 돼…? 다른 거… 배웠, 는데.

1000645867.english: Commander, do you see this? This red thread hanging from my finger... Haa! As expected, it was connected to you...
1000645867.korean: 사령관, 이거 보여? 손가락의 걸어둔 이 붉은색 실... 하아! 역시 너와 이어져 있었어...

1000645868.english: I remember the day I first saw the Commander. And for me... becoming a subordinate trusted by you was enough. ...But... it seems the time I spent with you... has been too long...
1000645868.korean: 사령관을 처음 봤던 날을 기억한다. 그리고 난... 그런 당신에게 신뢰받는 부하가 되는 걸로 충분했지.&n…하지만… 당신과 함께하는 시간이… 너무 길었던 것 같군…

1000645869.english: Really… Your Excellency is a cruel person… How can it always be only when someone is at their weakest… Are you trying to make it so I can’t refuse?
1000645869.korean: 정말… 각하는 나쁜 분입니다… 어떻게 이렇게 항상 사람이 제일 약할 때만…&n제가 거절을 못 하게 하시려는 건가요?

1000645870.english: The sea… a confession… Master, this isn’t just on impulse or a passing mood, is it? It mustn’t be. Because now I can’t help but think of you forever.
1000645870.korean: 바다… 고백… 주인님, 충동이나 한순간의 기분은 아니겠죠? 아니어야 해요.&n이렇게 전 영원히 주인님을 생각할 수밖에 없게 됐으니.

1000645871.english: So the operation has succeeded now? As expected, Miss Amy’s advice was right. To let go of what you don’t have and focus on what you do. At last, Commander, you’ve fallen for my charm. I’m happy. Truly.
1000645871.korean: 이제 작전이 성공한 건가요? 역시, 에이미 양의 조언이 옳았어요.&n가지지 못한 것에 대해서 마음을 비우고, 가진 것에 집중하라는 말.&n드디어 사령관도 내 매력에 현혹된 거군요. 기쁩니다. 정말로요.

1000645872.english: Really... it's romantic, Your Majesty... This is even more splendid and sweet than I imagined.&nYour Majesty... has declared here that you will look only at me. Hehe, be prepared from now on.&nI won't allow Your Majesty to become a flirt — not as the Captain of the Royal Guard.
1000645872.korean: 정말... 로맨틱해요 폐하... 이건, 제가 상상하던 것보다 더 멋지고 달콤해요…&n폐하는... 여기서 저만 바라보시기로 선언하셨어요. 후후, 앞으로는 각오하세요.&n폐하가 바람둥이가 되는 건, 총사대장으로서 용납할 수 없거든요.

1000645873.english: Well, I could tell just by the commander’s change in body temperature. This outfit is for the confession at sea, right? But what should I do… if I accept too easily the commander will get conceited… Even so… I should accept, right? I don't want to make an awkward face.
1000645873.korean: 뭐, 사령관의 체온 변화만 봐도 이럴 건 알고 있었어. 이 옷도 바다에서의 고백을 위해서지?&n근데 어쩌나… 너무 쉽게 받아줘 버리면 사령관이 기고만장해질 텐데…&n그래도… 받아줘야겠지? 칠칠치 않은 표정을 하는 건 싫으니까.

1000645874.english: Rest. And Your Excellency’s confession… Is this a dream? Why are only such wonderful things happening? It’s strange. Why is it only such joyful things…
1000645874.korean: 휴식. 그리고 각하의 고백… 이건 꿈입니까? 어째서 이런 좋은 일만 일어나는 거죠?&n이상합니다. 어째서 이렇게 기쁜 일만...

1000645875.english: The sea, paradise, rest — in a world that had been destroyed and turned gray, Master, you brought color.&nAnd… now I can see colors too. Master… what should I do… I wish I could express my feelings...
1000645875.korean: 바다, 낙원, 휴식, 모든 게 멸망해 회색이 되어 버린 세계에 주인님은 색을 가져다주셨어요.&n그리고… 제게도 이제 색들이 보이네요. 주인님… 어떡해… 마음을 표현할 수 있다면 좋을 텐데...

1000645876.english: Hehe, have you been watching this humble one like this? If you speak so passionately, I cannot refuse either. If you’ve been captivated by this side of me, I am delighted. Truly delighted.
1000645876.korean: 후훗, 이런 소첩의 모습을 보고 계셨사옵니까? 이리도 정열적으로 말씀하시오면&n저도 거절할 수가 없사옵니다. 소첩의 이 모습에 뇌쇄되신 거라도 소첩은 기쁘옵니다. 기쁘고 말고요.

1000645877.english: Eek! Are you okay? Uh… wait a moment! The commander is going to say something special to me, right? Can I… livestream this? It’s a special day… I want to tell everyone. Will you let me?
1000645877.korean: 으힉! 괜찮아? 에… 잠깐만! 사령관이 내게 특별한 말을 해주는 거지?&n이거… 생중계해도 돼? 특별한 날이잖아… 모두에게… 알리고 싶어. 허락해 주는 거야? 응?

1000645878.english: Eh? Commander... are you... giving this to me? Sister Lilith... said I absolutely shouldn't take it because it's practically a leash... Commander, you'll keep this a secret, right? Please, make it work!
1000645878.korean: 에에? 사령관님... 이거... 저 주시는 거예요? 리리스 언니가... 이런 거 목줄이나 다름없으니까&n절대 받으면 안 된다고 했었는데... 사령관님, 비밀 지켜주시는 거죠? 꼭이에요!

1000645879.english: I really want to kill them all... and spend time with Master on a beach like this... You want that too, don't you? If Master thinks of me so specially, I will do any game or pleasure you desire. Truly.
1000645879.korean: 정말 다 죽이고… 주인님과 이런 해변에서 지냈으면… 주인님도 그걸 원하시죠?&n주인님이 절 이렇게 특별하게 생각해 주시면 주인님이 원하는 놀이는 다 해 드릴 거예요. 정말로요.

1000645880.english: Commander. Is this... for real...? You're not just carried away by the seaside atmosphere, are you?&n...I really like it, Commander! I'll always... be with you.
1000645880.korean: 사령관. 이거, 정말이야...? 바다라고 분위기에 취해서, 그러는 거 아니지?&n...정말 좋아, 사령관! 항상... 같이 있어줄게.

1000645881.english: Commander, you’re totally weak… you get soft in places like this… that was your plan, wasn’t it? Tch… I can’t even refuse! I get weak in this kind of atmosphere too...
1000645881.korean: 사령관, 완전 약았어… 이런 데선 약해지는 거… 그걸 노린 거지?&n칫… 거절할 수도 없잖아! 나도 이런 분위기엔 약해지는걸...

1000645882.english: Ah, no. Momo can't stay long. The Magic Association won't leave the Commander alone.&nBut... if the Commander promises to hold Momo every day...&nthe Association will have to deal with Wedding Momo!
1000645882.korean: 아, 안돼요. 모모는 오래 머무를 수 없어요. 마법협회에서 사령관님을 가만두지 않을 거라구요.&n그치만... 사령관님이 매일 모모를 안아준다고 약속해주신다면… &n협회는 웨딩 모모를 상대해야 할 거예요!

1000645883.english: This shouldn't be... I shouldn't be doing this... Will the younger siblings I have to look after be okay? Yes... If you say so, Master... I suppose we must keep our relationship a secret... until the siblings understand...
1000645883.korean: 이러면… 안 되는데… 전 돌봐야 할 동생들이… 괜찮을까요? 네… 주인님께서 그렇게 말씀하신다면…&n저와 주인님 사이는 비밀로 해야겠어요… 동생들이 이해해 줄 때까지는요...
